description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on ubuntu-latest, macOS-latest, and windows-latest with Python versions 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9. For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with pip, install the package with flit, lint with flake8 on non-Windows platforms, test with pytest, and upload coverage to Codecov using a token from secrets.
